master_row.title: TZP-Modified Hamiltonian Operator
master_row.canonical_statement: The TZP-modified Hamiltonian acts on a state $|\Psi\rangle$ as $H_{\mathrm{T}}|\Psi\rangle=\int_{\Sigma}\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{T}}\,d\Sigma\,|\Psi\rangle$, where $\mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{T}}$ is the Hamiltonian density of ID 0029.
master_row.formation_note: Documented in the source as an integral expression relating Σ, Ψ, H, p.
master_row.dictionary: The TZP‑modified Hamiltonian (H_T) acts on a state ( ) as (H_T = _H_T,d, ), where (H_T) is the Hamiltonian density of ID 029.
master_row.encyclopedia: Technical interpretation remains tied to the local registry and equation witness. Interpretive role: This operator is the bridge between local field energetics and full state evolution. It provides the object later spectral, propagator, and quantum-thermodynamic entries can use as their canonical generator.
